Part.Source:
&sdtMercadoLivreGeneric.FromJson(&Longvarchar)
For Each Order EmpCod, MrkCod, MrkMenId Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where MrkCod = &MrkCod Where MrkMenId = &sdtMercadoLivreGeneric.id MrkMenCon = &sdtMercadoLivreGeneric.text MrkMenLong = &Longvarchar MrkMenProSku = &sdtMercadoLivreGeneric.item_id
&ano = val(Substr(&sdtMercadoLivreGeneric.date_created, 1, 4)) &Mes = val(Substr(&sdtMercadoLivreGeneric.date_created, 6, 2)) &dia = val(Substr(&sdtMercadoLivreGeneric.date_created, 9, 2)) &Hora = val(Substr(&sdtMercadoLivreGeneric.date_created, 12, 2)) &Minuto = val(Substr(&sdtMercadoLivreGeneric.date_created, 16, 2)) MrkMenDtaHorPer = YMDHMStoT(&ano,&mes, &dia, &Hora, &Minuto, &Segundo)
do case case &sdtMercadoLivreGeneric.status = 'ANSWERED' MrkMenSts = MarketplaceStatusMensagem.Respondida EndCase
if not &sdtMercadoLivreGeneric.answer.text.IsEmpty() MrkMenResp = &sdtMercadoLivreGeneric.answer.text
&ano = val(Substr(&sdtMercadoLivreGeneric.answer.date_created, 1, 4)) &Mes = val(Substr(&sdtMercadoLivreGeneric.answer.date_created, 6, 2)) &dia = val(Substr(&sdtMercadoLivreGeneric.answer.date_created, 9, 2)) &Hora = val(Substr(&sdtMercadoLivreGeneric.answer.date_created, 12, 2)) &Minuto = val(Substr(&sdtMercadoLivreGeneric.answer.date_created, 16, 2)) MrkMenDtaHorResp = YMDHMStoT(&ano,&mes, &dia, &Hora, &Minuto, &Segundo)
Endif
Exit When none New EmpCod = &EmpCod MrkCod = &MrkCod MrkMenId = &sdtMercadoLivreGeneric.id MrkMenCon = &sdtMercadoLivreGeneric.text MrkMenLong = &Longvarchar MrkMenProSku = &sdtMercadoLivreGeneric.item_id
&ano = val(Substr(&sdtMercadoLivreGeneric.date_created, 1, 4)) &Mes = val(Substr(&sdtMercadoLivreGeneric.date_created, 6, 2)) &dia = val(Substr(&sdtMercadoLivreGeneric.date_created, 9, 2)) &Hora = val(Substr(&sdtMercadoLivreGeneric.date_created, 12, 2)) &Minuto = val(Substr(&sdtMercadoLivreGeneric.date_created, 16, 2)) MrkMenDtaHorPer = YMDHMStoT(&ano,&mes, &dia, &Hora, &Minuto, &Segundo)
do case case &sdtMercadoLivreGeneric.status = 'ANSWERED' MrkMenSts = MarketplaceStatusMensagem.Respondida EndCase
if not &sdtMercadoLivreGeneric.answer.text.IsEmpty() MrkMenResp = &sdtMercadoLivreGeneric.answer.text
&ano = val(Substr(&sdtMercadoLivreGeneric.answer.date_created, 1, 4)) &Mes = val(Substr(&sdtMercadoLivreGeneric.answer.date_created, 6, 2)) &dia = val(Substr(&sdtMercadoLivreGeneric.answer.date_created, 9, 2)) &Hora = val(Substr(&sdtMercadoLivreGeneric.answer.date_created, 12, 2)) &Minuto = val(Substr(&sdtMercadoLivreGeneric.answer.date_created, 16, 2)) MrkMenDtaHorResp = YMDHMStoT(&ano,&mes, &dia, &Hora, &Minuto, &Segundo)
Endif EndNew EndFor
commit
